parameters.content:
## Google Alerts AI Digest — RSS + GPT-4.1-mini + Gmail Daily Email

For brand managers, PR teams, and competitive intelligence analysts who want a daily summary of all their Google Alerts — automatically analyzed, scored by relevance, and delivered as a formatted HTML email digest. A schedule trigger fires daily. A Code node defines the Google Alerts RSS feed URLs with names and categories — add as many feeds as needed. HTTP fetches each feed as XML text. A Code node parses the Atom entries within the last 48 hours, cleans HTML entities, and extracts title, link, summary, and published date. An IF node skips feeds with no new results. GPT-4.1-mini analyzes each alert and returns a relevance score (1–10), a one-sentence insight, sentiment (Positive/Neutral/Negative), and a recommended action. A Code node parses the AI JSON output with fallbacks. An IF node keeps only alerts scoring 4 or above. An Aggregate node collects all filtered alerts into one array. A final Code node groups alerts by category, sorts by relevance, and builds a branded HTML email with a stats bar, colored relevance badges, and sentiment tags. Gmail sends the digest.

## How it works
- **1. Schedule — Every 24 Hours** triggers the pipeline daily
- **2. Code — Set Alert Feed URLs** defines the RSS feed array with name, url, and category. Add multiple feeds by uncommenting the example entries
- **3. HTTP — Fetch RSS Feed** fetches each RSS feed as plain text XML
- **4. Code — Parse RSS Entries** parses Atom XML entries from the last 48 hours, strips HTML, and emits one item per article
- **5. IF — Has Results?** — TRUE (has articles): proceeds to AI analysis | FALSE (empty feed): stops silently
- **6. AI Agent — Analyze Alert** sends each article to GPT-4.1-mini for relevance score, insight, sentiment, and action recommendation
- **OpenAI — GPT-4.1-mini Model** language model attached to the AI Agent (temp 0.2, max 250 tokens)
- **7. Code — Parse AI Response** strips markdown fences, parses the JSON, validates sentiment, and merges with original article data
- **8. IF — Filter Relevance (Score 4 or Above)** keeps only articles scoring 4 or higher
- **9. Aggregate — Collect All Alerts** aggregates all filtered articles into a single data array
- **10. Code — Build HTML Email Digest** groups by category, sorts by relevance score, builds the full HTML email with stat bar and colored cards
- **11. Gmail — Send Digest Email** sends the HTML digest to your email address

## Set up steps
1. In **2. Code — Set Alert Feed URLs** — replace the example Google Alerts RSS URL with your own. Get your feed URL from google.com/alerts → your alert → RSS icon. Add multiple feeds by duplicating the object in the array
2. In **OpenAI — GPT-4.1-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI API credential
3. In **11. Gmail — Send Digest Email** — connect Gmail OAuth2 credential and replace `REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_EMAIL@example.com`
4. In **10. Code — Build HTML Email Digest** — replace `YOUR_BRAND_NAME` in the footer with your company name

nodes.name: Section — Schedule and Alert Feed URL Config

parameters.content:
## Schedule and Alert Feed URL Config
Schedule fires every 24 hours. Code node defines the RSS feed array — add name, URL, and category for each Google Alert feed. Multiple feeds are supported.

nodes.name: Section — RSS Fetch and Entry Parse

parameters.content:
## RSS Fetch and Entry Parse
HTTP fetches the RSS XML for each feed. Code parses Atom entries within the last 48 hours, strips HTML entities, and emits one item per article.

nodes.name: Section — Has Results Check and GPT-4.1-mini Alert Analysis

parameters.content:
## Has Results Check and GPT-4.1-mini Alert Analysis
IF skips empty feeds silently. AI Agent analyzes each article — returns relevance 1–10, one-sentence insight, sentiment (Positive/Neutral/Negative), and action recommendation.

nodes.name: Section — AI Response Parse, Relevance Filter, and Aggregate

parameters.content:
## AI Response Parse, Relevance Filter, and Aggregate
Code parses AI JSON with fallbacks. IF keeps only alerts scoring 4 or above. Aggregate collects all filtered alerts into one array for the email builder.

nodes.name: Section — HTML Digest Build and Gmail Send

parameters.content:
## HTML Digest Build and Gmail Send
Code groups alerts by category, sorts by relevance score, and builds the HTML email with stat bar and colored relevance and sentiment badges. Gmail sends the digest.

options.systemMessage: You are a precise news analyst. Always respond with valid JSON only. No markdown fences, no preamble, no explanation. Just the raw JSON object.
